name: Matchstick
description: Matches spilled from the box — vermilion heads on pale sticks, one in a while burnt to charcoal, re-scattered per redraw.

code.style: --strike: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( /* head and stick share one emitted angle, the head riding the stick's end */ --ma: @r(360deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 22%; top: 48%; width: 56%; height: calc(52px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color2); transform: rotate(@var(--ma)); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 70%; top: 46.5%; width: 9%; height: calc(86px / @Y); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color1); transform: rotate(@var(--ma)); transform-origin: -228% 50%; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.14) { :after { background: var(--color3); } :before { transform: rotate(var(--strike)); opacity: 0.8; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
